The '''Lantern of Sacred Light''' was an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Totem magic|totem]]. The belief was that as long as it remained lit, Ewok villages on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] would be protected from the [[Night Spirit/Legends|Night Spirit]]. <ref name="Guide" />

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|The Tree of Light}} {{1st}}
